titleStmt.title: SII 9.470: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 470. (A.R. No. 403 of 1928.) ON A SLAB, BROKEN IN THREE PIECES AND LYING IN THE CHOULTRY ATTACHED TO THE TEMPLE OF THE GODDESS MUKAMBIKA AT KOLLUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1404, Plava, Māgha, śu. 15, Ādityavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1482 February 3 Sunday, in the reign of Virūpāksharāya ruling from Vidyānagarī. It records a gift of land made by the Sāvanta Baṅki-Arasa and Honnakaṁbaḷi for offerings to the goddess Mūkāṁbikādēvī at Kollūru, while Paṇḍaridēva was governing Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Siṅgaṇa-Daṇṇāyaka. Sihga-Oḍeya the Sthānakarta of the temple is praised for his ascetic qualities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śrīgaṇādhipatē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyāyai namaḥ śrīguru
bhyō namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
hēmaprakhyāmiṁdukhaṁḍātmamauliśaṁbhōriṣṭāṁ bhītiha
stāṁ triṇētrāṁ hēmābjasthāṁ pītavastrāṁ prasa(ṁ)nnāṁ . dēvīṁ durgā
ṁ divyarūpāṁ namāmi . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśa
kavaruśa 1404 neya saṁda vartamāna plavasaṁvatsarada māgha
śuddha 15 Ādityavāradalu svasti śrīma(ṁ)mmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpanāda śrīvirūpākṣa rāya
ru śrīvidyānagariya siṁhāsanadalu Āḷi paṁpāvirūpā
kṣana saṁnidhiyalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda sakaḷa sāṁbrā
jyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalu nirūpadiṁda śrīmaṁma
hāpradhāna siṁgaṇadaṁṇāya gnadhārakarumappa paṁ
ḍaridēvaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu pratipālisuva kāla
dalu śrīmukāṁbikādēvi pādapadmārādhakaru yamanai
māsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇasamādhiAṣṭāṁgayō
gānuṣṭhānasaṁpannarumappa siṁgaOḍeyaru kaṁdamūlaphalakṣīrā
hāradiṁ tā parvatakke Ādhidēvatiyāgidaṁthā Ādiśakti jō
tirliṁga prakaṭamūrtiyāgidaṁthā kollūra mukāṁbikādēviya sthāna
doḷage māḍi śrīmukāṁbikādēviya kāruṇyavaraprasādadiṁda
śrīmūkāṁbikādēvi taṁna sthānake kartara māḍikoṁḍu sthānavanu Ū
rjitava māḍuvāga śrīma(ṁ)nnumēdinīgaṁḍaragōva biridāṁ
kasakalaguṇasaṁpannarumappa kollūra durgādhipatigaḷa haku
ḷeyara baḷige samarththaru kadariya mageya beṁmacasāvaṁta
rāda baṁkiArasaru honnakaṁbaḷiyaru kollūra mukāṁ
bikādēvige Amrutapaḍi naivēdyake māḍida dharmaśāsana
da kramaveṁteṁdare �yo Amrutapaḍige biṭṭa bāḷine catussī
meya vivara mukādēvikāsthānada sa�mopadali muḍalu hari
da hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu halasina māni kūla
ṁbikoḍalu Aṟeya māliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kudu
reguṁḍiya harida hoḷeyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu hari
da hoḷeyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷḷa dēvā
lyada beṭṭina baḍagalu bittuva bījavari hāne nālvattaṟa lekka
dalu nālvattu muḍe gadde kalukaṭige makki bittuva bījavari mu
yaṁ bayalu mu bitu
variya bhūmiyanu �yo catu
ḍu lokki niḍi Anubha senubha Akṣīṇi Āgāmi
la pāṣāṇa siddha sādhya yēnuḷaṁthādanu sarvamānyava
ra(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārapūrvakavāgi yeṟadu koṭṭeU
bhūmiyiṁda śrīmukāṁbikādēvige pratidina Oṁ
ṁ naḍadu baha Akki mukāṁbikādēviya sthānakke kartaru siṁ
gappaOḍeyaru maṭhakke mu 2 gaddege naḍadu baha Akki mu
siṁgappaOḍeyaru śrīmūkāṁbikādēvige nitya muṟu
hottina śrībalige māḍida kaṭṭaḷeya vivara mēluśāṁti kī
ḷuśāṁti bali dēvara hoṟuva brahmaṇa saha Āṁtu muvaru
Aḍigaḷu Avarige biṭṭa bāḷu kaṁbaḷa gadde kusiya tarada gade
gaḷu 5 Ottina talabu 1 naḍutāṟa hāḷi 7 Aṁttu mu 10
gade gēṇi Akki mu 54 bali kalacaruvige hirigade Ottina
talabuva muḍalu hoḷe Ottina hāḷigaḷu 7 saha ha 60 ga
de gēṇi Akki mu 6 . dēvaḍigaḷige yeṟadu koṭṭa vivara modava
ṁtebaḷiya yekkanāthige mu 8 gade Ā gadeyiṁda nitya nālvā
ne Akki naivēdya naḍasuva vādya haḷage maddaḷe 2 gaṁgara baḷiya
duggaṇage mu 8 gade Ā gaddeyiṁda nitya nālvāne Akki naivēdya
naḍasuva vādya maddaḷe kiṟugāḷe 2 moḷaku baḷiya dēuge
mu 4 gadde Ā gaddeyiṁda nitya yippāne Akki naivēdya naḍasu vā
dya tāḷa 1 toḷahara baḷiya cimmaṇage mu 8 gadde honnaṇi
1 ke makkiya Oḷage mu 3 Ā gaddeyiṁda nitya nālvāne Akki naivē
dya naḍava vādya jēgaṭe kiṟugāḷe 2 Aṁtu nitya ha 22 Akki
naḍaudu �yo dharmasthaḷada bāḷige maṭhake śāṁtige naḍava Akki ga
de Amrutapaḍige naḍava Akkiyanaḷidavaru kuḍukūra kōṭi
liṁgana liṁgava kittavaru vāraṇāsiyali yeraḍusāvirada
nūṟaṁndu kapileya koṁda pāpakke hōharu sāvira ghaṭṭa
dali naḍava hēṟinettina pāpakke hōharu vēdapālakarāgidaṁ
thā sāviradanūṟaOṁdu maṁdi brāhmaranu gōkarnadali koṁ
da pāpakke hōharu yiṁdraḥ pru(ḥ)chatu cāṁḍālī kimidaṁ pa
cyetē mayā . svamāṁsaṁ surayā siktaṁ kapālēna citāgninā . dēva
brāhmaṇavittānāṁ balādapaharaṁtē jē tēśāṁ pādarajō
bhītyā carmaṇā pihita(ṁ) mmayā . svadattaṁ vā paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdhara . śaṣṭirvarusasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ . �yo dharmasthaḷada Amrutapaḍige dēvaḍigaḷige biṭṭa
bāḷige Arththa Aruvāra salla Ārobbaru koṭṭa honnu hoku
�yo dēvaḍigaḷu dēvālyake kalumarana hoṟabēku hōda baṁ
dalli kaṭṭi hoḍasuvaru biṭṭi yettu kaṭṭina hullusalla . dānapā
lanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāsvargamavā
pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . virūpākṣarāyara Oppa siṁgaṇada
ṇāyakara Oppa paṁḍaridēvaOḍeyara Oppa siṁgappaOḍeya
ra Oppa baṁkiArasaru honnekaṁbaḷiyara Oppa saṁkusāvaṁ
tara Oppa bakkiheggaḍeyara Oppa honnappaheggaḍeyara Oppa
tirumalakkadēviyara Oppa saṁkanāyakara Oppa ye
ruḍu kōla baḷiya Oppa maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrīśrī
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.470 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
